title: Root Equals Sum of Children
titleCn: 判断根结点是否等于子结点之和

testcases.input: root = [10,4,6] Output: true Explanation: The values of the root, its left child, and its right child are 10, 4, and 6, respectively. 10 is equal to 4 + 6, so we return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The values of the root, its left child, and its right child are 10, 4, and 6, respectively. 10 is equal to 4 + 6, so we return true.

testcases.input: root = [5,3,1] Output: false Explanation: The values of the root, its left child, and its right child are 5, 3, and 1, respectively. 5 is not equal to 3 + 1, so we return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The values of the root, its left child, and its right child are 5, 3, and 1, respectively. 5 is not equal to 3 + 1, so we return false.
